feature_description: Validates flat rate margin calculation following the three-step process: aggregating positions by sub-margin group, applying flat margin rates, and applying the margin multiplier per HKEX requirements.

scenarios.title: Successful flat rate margin calculation with multiple sub-margin groups

given_steps.step_text: a clearing participant has positions across multiple sub-margin groups
given_steps.step_pattern: a clearing participant has positions across multiple sub-margin groups

given_steps.step_text: sub-group 1 has long positions with total absolute market value of 30,000,000 HKD and short positions with total absolute market value of 60,000,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: sub-group 1 has long positions with total absolute market value of {long_value_1} HKD and short positions with total absolute market value of {short_value_1} HKD

given_steps.step_text: sub-group 2 has long positions with total absolute market value of 750,000 HKD and no short positions
given_steps.step_pattern: sub-group 2 has long positions with total absolute market value of {long_value_2} HKD and no short positions

given_steps.step_text: sub-group 3 has no long positions and short positions with total absolute market value of 300,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: sub-group 3 has no long positions and short positions with total absolute market value of {short_value_3} HKD

given_steps.step_text: flat margin rates are defined under FieldType 3 (e.g., 12%, 30%, 55%)
given_steps.step_pattern: flat margin rates are defined under FieldType 3

given_steps.step_text: a flat rate margin multiplier of 2 is assigned per DWH0081C report
given_steps.step_pattern: a flat rate margin multiplier of {multiplier} is assigned per DWH0081C report

when_steps.step_text: the flat rate margin calculation is performed
when_steps.step_pattern: the flat rate margin calculation is performed

then_steps.step_text: the system includes only short positions for sub-group 1 (higher absolute market value)
then_steps.step_pattern: the system includes only {position_type} positions for sub-group {group_id} (higher absolute market value)

then_steps.step_text: the system includes only long positions for sub-group 2 (higher absolute market value)
then_steps.step_pattern: the system includes only {position_type} positions for sub-group {group_id} (higher absolute market value)

then_steps.step_text: the system includes only short positions for sub-group 3 (higher absolute market value)
then_steps.step_pattern: the system includes only {position_type} positions for sub-group {group_id} (higher absolute market value)
the flat rate margin is calculated as {expected_value} HKD

assumptions: Flat margin rates under FieldType 3 are retrieved from HKEX website configuration
Margin multiplier is obtained from Daily Participant Margin Multiplier Report (DWH0081C)

scenarios.title: Flat rate margin calculation when long and short absolute market values are equal

given_steps.step_text: a clearing participant has positions in a sub-margin group
given_steps.step_pattern: a clearing participant has positions in a sub-margin group

given_steps.step_text: the total absolute market value of long positions equals the total absolute market value of short positions (e.g., both are 50,000,000 HKD)
given_steps.step_pattern: the total absolute market value of long positions equals the total absolute market value of short positions

given_steps.step_text: flat margin rates are defined under FieldType 3
given_steps.step_pattern: flat margin rates are defined under FieldType 3

given_steps.step_text: a flat rate margin multiplier is assigned per DWH0081C report
given_steps.step_pattern: a flat rate margin multiplier is assigned per DWH0081C report

when_steps.step_text: the flat rate margin calculation is performed for this sub-margin group
when_steps.step_pattern: the flat rate margin calculation is performed for this sub-margin group

then_steps.step_text: the system determines which positions to include based on the tie-breaking rule when long and short absolute market values are equal
then_steps.step_pattern: the system determines which positions to include based on the tie-breaking rule when long and short absolute market values are equal

then_steps.step_text: the flat rate margin calculation proceeds with the determined position set
then_steps.step_pattern: the flat rate margin calculation proceeds with the determined position set

assumptions: The tie-breaking behavior when long and short absolute market values are equal is not explicitly defined in the provided evidence
The system may have a defined rule (e.g., include both, include neither, or prefer one side) that should be verified against HKEX specifications

scenarios.title: Validation of required input data for flat rate margin calculation

given_steps.step_text: a clearing participant submits position data for flat rate margin calculation
given_steps.step_pattern: a clearing participant submits position data for flat rate margin calculation

given_steps.step_text: position data includes instrument IDs, quantities, and market values
given_steps.step_pattern: position data includes instrument IDs, quantities, and market values

when_steps.step_text: the submitted position data is missing required fields such as absolute market value, position direction (long/short), or sub-margin group classification
when_steps.step_pattern: the submitted position data is missing required fields such as {missing_fields}

then_steps.step_text: the system rejects the calculation request
then_steps.step_pattern: the system rejects the calculation request

then_steps.step_text: an appropriate validation error is returned indicating the missing or invalid required fields
then_steps.step_pattern: an appropriate validation error is returned indicating the missing or invalid required fields

assumptions: Required fields include: instrument ID, quantity, absolute market value in HKD equivalent, position direction (long/short), and sub-margin group assignment
Validation occurs before Step 1 of the flat rate margin calculation

feature_description: Validates the two-step calculation and rounding of aggregated market-risk-component margin per the LME formula and rounding parameter from the Initial Margin Risk Parameter File.

scenarios.title: Calculate and round aggregated market-risk-component margin

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant has market risk components with Portfolio margin = 10,000,000
given_steps.step_pattern: A clearing participant has market risk components with Portfolio margin = 10,000,000

given_steps.step_text: Flat rate margin = 15,180,000
given_steps.step_pattern: Flat rate margin = 15,180,000

given_steps.step_text: Liquidation risk add-on = 266,865
given_steps.step_pattern: Liquidation risk add-on = 266,865

given_steps.step_text: Structured product add-on = 550,000
given_steps.step_pattern: Structured product add-on = 550,000

given_steps.step_text: Corporate action position margin = 2,500,000
given_steps.step_pattern: Corporate action position margin = 2,500,000

given_steps.step_text: Holiday add-on = 18,433,039
given_steps.step_pattern: Holiday add-on = 18,433,039

given_steps.step_text: The Initial Margin Risk Parameter File specifies a rounding parameter of 10,000
given_steps.step_pattern: The Initial Margin Risk Parameter File specifies a rounding parameter of 10,000

when_steps.step_text: The system calculates the aggregated market-risk-component margin and applies rounding
when_steps.step_pattern: The system calculates the aggregated market-risk-component margin and applies rounding

then_steps.step_text: The aggregated margin is calculated as 46,929,904
then_steps.step_pattern: The aggregated margin is calculated as 46,929,904

then_steps.step_text: The aggregated margin is rounded up to 46,930,000
then_steps.step_pattern: The aggregated margin is rounded up to 46,930,000

scenarios.title: Aggregated margin at exact rounding boundary

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant has market risk components that sum to exactly 46,930,000
given_steps.step_pattern: A clearing participant has market risk components that sum to exactly 46,930,000

given_steps.step_text: The Initial Margin Risk Parameter File specifies a rounding parameter of 10,000
given_steps.step_pattern: The Initial Margin Risk Parameter File specifies a rounding parameter of 10,000

when_steps.step_text: The system rounds up the aggregated margin to the nearest 10,000
when_steps.step_pattern: The system rounds up the aggregated margin to the nearest 10,000

then_steps.step_text: The rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin remains 46,930,000
then_steps.step_pattern: The rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin remains 46,930,000

assumptions: When the aggregated margin is exactly divisible by the rounding parameter, no upward adjustment is needed since the value is already at a rounding boundary

then_steps.step_pattern: The rounding parameter from the Initial Margin Risk Parameter File is retrieved and applied to round up the aggregated margin

feature_description: Validates the calculation of Favorable MTM (or MTM requirement) using the formula: Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio, ensuring correct handling of positive, negative, boundary, and validation conditions.

scenarios.title: Calculate Favorable MTM using portfolio market and contract values

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant has a portfolio with market value of -300,550,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: A clearing participant has a portfolio with market value of -300,550,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: The portfolio has a contract value of -287,850,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: The portfolio has a contract value of -287,850,000 HKD

when_steps.step_text: The system calculates Favorable MTM using the formula: Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio
when_steps.step_pattern: The system calculates Favorable MTM using the formula: Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio

then_steps.step_text: The Favorable MTM (or MTM requirement) is calculated as -12,700,000 HKD
then_steps.step_pattern: The Favorable MTM (or MTM requirement) is calculated as -12,700,000 HKD

then_steps.step_text: The negative result is identified as an MTM requirement
then_steps.step_pattern: The negative result is identified as an MTM requirement

then_steps.step_text: The favorable MTM is set to zero since the result is negative
then_steps.step_pattern: The favorable MTM is set to zero since the result is negative

assumptions: Values are provided in HKD equivalent as per Appendix 4.6 for multi-currency portfolios
Numbers are rounded off at position level

scenarios.title: Favorable MTM calculation at zero result boundary

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant has a portfolio with market value of -250,000,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: A clearing participant has a portfolio with market value of -250,000,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: The portfolio has a contract value of -250,000,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: The portfolio has a contract value of -250,000,000 HKD

when_steps.step_text: The system calculates Favorable MTM using the formula: Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio
when_steps.step_pattern: The system calculates Favorable MTM using the formula: Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio

then_steps.step_text: The Favorable MTM (or MTM requirement) is calculated as 0 HKD
then_steps.step_pattern: The Favorable MTM (or MTM requirement) is calculated as 0 HKD

then_steps.step_text: The result at the boundary is validated as neither favorable MTM nor MTM requirement
then_steps.step_pattern: The result at the boundary is validated as neither favorable MTM nor MTM requirement

assumptions: A zero result represents the exact boundary between favorable MTM (positive) and MTM requirement (negative)
The system correctly handles the mutually exclusive nature of favorable MTM and MTM requirement at this boundary

feature_title: Total MTM and Margin Requirement Calculation
feature_description: Validates that total MTM and margin requirement is correctly derived by summing net margin after credit and all other risk components.

scenarios.title: Calculate total MTM and margin requirement with all components

given_steps.step_pattern: Net margin after credit value is available (e.g., {net_margin_after_credit})

given_steps.step_pattern: MTM requirement value is available (e.g., {mtm_requirement})

when_steps.step_pattern: The system derives total MTM and margin requirement

then_steps.step_pattern: Total MTM and margin requirement equals the sum of all components (e.g., {expected_total})

assumptions: All component values are valid and within acceptable ranges

then.code:
@then("Total MTM and margin requirement equals the sum of all applicable components excluding credit risk add-on")
def step_total_excludes_credit_risk_addon():
    components = LME.API.get_margin_components()
    expected = (components['net_margin_after_credit'] + 
                components['mtm_requirement'] + 
                components['position_limit_addon'] + 
                components['adhoc_addon'])
    actual = calculation_result['total_mtm_margin_requirement']
    assert abs(actual - expected) < 0.01, f"Expected {expected}, got {actual}"

then.step_text: The calculation is rejected
